scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:browser
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/semantic-markdown build && bun run --cwd packages/book-export build && bun run --cwd packages/theia-git-fork build && bun run --cwd packages/manuscript-workspace build
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/semantic-markdown clean && bun run --cwd packages/book-export clean && bun run --cwd packages/theia-git-fork clean && bun run --cwd packages/manuscript-workspace clean && rm -rf apps/browser/lib apps/browser/.theia apps/electron/lib apps/electron/.theia
scripts.verify: bun test packages && bun run build && bun run build:electron
